name: Old Airport Park
description: Old Airport Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Millersburg, OH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Sheiyah Court
description: Sheiyah Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Berlin, OH. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Reservations are available. The court is private.
